title: Group & Status Colour Options - Introduce HEX codes and more options
excerpt:
Description
Would really like to have multiple more options for colours in statuses and groups. 
What are you trying to achieve
More options, branding and grouping colour matching

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
